texto: In general, it’s not too hard to corrupt an American, mostly a matter of supply to their demand. Supply should be variegated to encourage the Illusion of Choice. Other than that they’re looking for numbness, so be ready to sedate. Drugs, booze, television, shopping, etc…
autor: Geoffrey Wood Grimrack An Infernal Epistolary
explicacao: Orientação direta de Geoffrey Wood Grimrack An Infernal Epistolary sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “In general, it’s not too hard to corrupt an American, mostly a matter of supply to their demand. …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, america, americans, útil em momentos de americans e choice.
